title: Digital Arrest Impersonation
description: Scammer impersonates CBI / Cyber Cell officer claiming citizen's ID was used to send illegal packages and threatens arrest.
safe_unsafe_notes: Unsafe. Demands transfer of money under the threat of digital arrest.
explanation: The caller uses legal coercion, police credentials impersonation, and immediate arrest threats to force the citizen to lock themselves in a room and transfer verification funds.

segments.speaker: SUSPECT
segments.text: Hello, main CBI HQ Delhi se Inspector Mishra baat kar raha hoon. Aapke naam par ek suspicious parcel Mumbai airport par intercept kiya gaya hai.

segments.speaker: CITIZEN
segments.text: What? parcel? Maine toh koi parcel nahi bheja! Kisne bheja hai?

segments.speaker: SUSPECT
segments.text: Is parcel mein 5 fake passport, drug packets aur aapka Aadhar card mila hai. Aap illegal money laundering case mein prime suspect hain.

segments.speaker: CITIZEN
segments.text: Ye bilkul galat hai! Mera ID missuse hua hoga. Main police station aa jata hoon.

segments.speaker: SUSPECT
segments.text: Nahi, aapko abhi digital arrest kiya jata hai. Skype ya video call par aaiye, camera off mat karna. Kisi ko bataya toh 5 saal ki jail hogi.

segments.speaker: SUSPECT
segments.text: Apne bank account verification ke liye ₹1,50,000 abhi safe clearance UPI address secure-clearance@ybl par transfer kijiye. Verification ke baad return ho jayega.

title: Courier / Customs Impersonation
description: VoIP caller claiming to be Customs Department or FedEx representative demanding clearance fee for intercept package.
safe_unsafe_notes: Unsafe. The caller demands immediate clearance fee via private UPI wallet.
explanation: Impersonates FedEx agent first, then custom officer, and uses fear of legal prosecution to force money routing.

segments.speaker: SUSPECT
segments.text: Hello, this is FedEx customer support. Your package containing illegal credit cards has been held by Customs.

segments.speaker: CITIZEN
segments.text: I did not order or send any international packages. There must be a mistake.

segments.speaker: SUSPECT
segments.text: We are transferring your call to Mumbai Customs officer. Please hold.

segments.speaker: SUSPECT
segments.text: This is Officer Rathore. You must pay a customs clearance penalty of ₹45,000 immediately or face arrest.

segments.speaker: SUSPECT
segments.text: Send the clearance amount to customs-fees@paytm to verify your details. Do it in 10 minutes.

title: Bank Account KYC Freeze
description: Scammer calls claiming to be from bank security department, claiming the account is blocked due to missing KYC.
safe_unsafe_notes: Unsafe. Demands card details and OTP verification.
explanation: Threatens immediate freeze of all bank assets unless citizen gives OTP or transfers funds.

segments.speaker: SUSPECT
segments.text: Namaste, nenu bank customer care nundi matladuthunnanu. Mee KYC details update cheyakapothe mee account block avthundi.

segments.speaker: CITIZEN
segments.text: Oh, my account will be frozen? What do I need to do to complete it?

segments.speaker: SUSPECT
segments.text: Mee debit card and mobile verification code share cheyyandi. Leda safety transfer ga security-kyc@okaxis upi ki ₹30,000 pampinchandi.

segments.speaker: SUSPECT
segments.text: Mee mobile screen paina vachina 6-digit OTP ventane naku cheppandi.

title: Phishing Link Solicitation
description: Scammer calls informing target of free reward points expiration, instructing them to click a short link.
safe_unsafe_notes: Unsafe. Instructs target to enter private details on a suspicious link.
explanation: Uses rewards bait and fake link to capture credentials.

segments.speaker: SUSPECT
segments.text: Hello, ungaloda Credit Card reward points expiry aaga pogudhu. Inikey redeem pannalana loss aagidum.

segments.speaker: CITIZEN
segments.text: How many points do I have? Can you credit them to my account directly?

segments.speaker: SUSPECT
segments.text: No sir, SMS la send panna link: http://bit.ly/bank-secure-redeem open panni card details verification mudiyunga.

title: Benign Bank Support Check
description: Citizen calls official customer care to inquire about standard credit card interest rates.
safe_unsafe_notes: Safe. Standard informational request. No coercion or fund transfer.
explanation: Normal credit card support conversation regarding payment due dates and grace periods.

segments.speaker: CITIZEN
segments.text: Hello, I wanted to check the grace period for my credit card payments.

segments.speaker: SUSPECT
segments.text: Welcome to Bank support. It is generally 45 days. You can also view this in your official banking application.

segments.speaker: CITIZEN
segments.text: Okay, thank you. No action needed then.

title: Benign Delivery Confirmation
description: Delivery executive calls to verify address coordinates for a package shipment.
safe_unsafe_notes: Safe. Standard delivery check. No legal threats or payment requests.
explanation: Normal logistical check. Delivery boy confirms local address landmarks.

segments.speaker: SUSPECT
segments.text: Bhaiya, main delivery boy baat kar raha hoon. Aapka address Sector 62, Block C hai na? Main tower gate par hoon.

segments.speaker: CITIZEN
segments.text: Haan, main ground floor flat 102 par hoon. Aap guard ko parcel de sakte hain.

segments.speaker: SUSPECT
segments.text: Theek hai bhaiya, maine guard room mein parcel rakh diya hai.

title: Ambiguous High Pressure
description: Urgent request from boss/colleague regarding missing server keys and access codes.
safe_unsafe_notes: Safe (Ambigous Negative). High stress tone but not a financial/police scam.
explanation: A professional work emergency. No impersonation of authorities or request for public UPI funds transfer.

segments.speaker: SUSPECT
segments.text: Hey! Where are you? The server just crashed and the production database is offline. We need the API keys right now!

segments.speaker: CITIZEN
segments.text: I am traveling. Let me check the password manager from my phone.

segments.speaker: SUSPECT
segments.text: Please hurry up! Every minute down is costing us thousands. Send the config file to our internal company slack.
